MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WILSON CHIANG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Appearances: Wilson Chiang (no phone number provided) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona. No other appearances. Mr. Chiang provided the court with a copy of the moving papers and proof of service. Upon review, and no opposition having been filed, the court granted the motion. Mr. Chiang to submit a proposed form of order and directed to then file his answer. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
